{{Infobox group
| name = High Council of Alchemists
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[High Council of Alchemists]] has a white table that is an ancient artifact.}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
